findings.title: Cluster token is embedded in every status report body
findings.impact: Every `dscli status` invocation serializes the deployment's `DS_CLUSTER_TOKEN` into the JSON body sent to the collector. If the collector stores raw reports, request bodies are logged by an intermediary, or an operator captures/debugs the payload, the cluster credential is exposed alongside routine inventory data.
findings.fix: Do not include the raw token in the report payload. Authenticate the request with the repository's existing credential handling pattern, such as a dedicated authorization header or signed request, and ensure the collector never persists the secret with inventory data.
